faq_list.q: How long does it take to learn German?
faq_list.a: It depends on your goals and intensity. Usually, you can master A1 level in 2-3 months, and B1 level in 6-8 months.
Our classes are held both offline and online, using interactive methods.

faq_list.q: Does the center provide a certificate?
faq_list.a: Yes, students who successfully complete the course will receive a certificate from our center.

faq_list.q: What happens if I miss a class?
faq_list.a: Our classes are recorded and you can review them later.

faq_list.q: Is there an option to pay in installments?
faq_list.a: Yes, we have the option to pay tuition fees in installments.

faq_list.q: How many students are in the groups?
faq_list.a: To provide quality education, our groups accept up to 8-12 students.

faq_list.q: What qualifications do the teachers have?
faq_list.a: All our teachers have international certificates and are specialists with experience in Germany.
You can register through the website or contact us by phone.
